title: Abbey Mortgage Bank Plc set to hold 33rd Annual General Meeting on May 28. - FinancialEDGE
description: Abbey Mortgage Bank Plc, a renowned financial institution in Nigeria will hold its 33rd Annual General Meeting (AGM) on Wednesday, May 28th, 2025. The virtual event is scheduled to hold by 11:00am and the details for participation will be made available on the Bank’s website and official communication channels in the coming days. This year's
html: Abbey Mortgage Bank Plc, a renowned financial institution in Nigeria will hold its 33rd Annual General Meeting (AGM) on Wednesday, May 28th, 2025.
